title: Starter pack — your first teaser posts
subtitle: Five short posts to introduce Jot. One a day, any order. Copy, attach the visual, post in the window. Done.

items.label: The hook
items.text:
I stopped typing.

Hotkey → speak → it's written. Any app on your Mac.

Free. On-device. Open source.
items.note: Link goes in the first reply, never the post.

items.label: The price punch
items.note: The card does all the talking — don't add more words. Link in first reply.

items.label: The builder intro
items.text:
I think faster than I type. So I built Jot — a free, open-source dictation app for the Mac.

Press a hotkey, speak, and the words land at your cursor. Your voice never leaves the machine.

What's the first thing you'd dictate instead of type?
items.note: Ends with a question on purpose — answer every comment in hour one. Link in FIRST COMMENT.

items.label: The argument starter
items.text:
Would you let an app stream your voice to its cloud just so you can type faster?

(Run this as a poll: Yes / No / I'd want it on-device)
items.note: Polls get the cheapest engagement on X. Reply to your own poll next day with the privacy card + link.

items.label: The 15-second proof
items.text:
Talk instead of type 🎙️ Free, open source, and your voice never leaves your Mac. Link in bio.

#macos #dictation #opensource #productivity #macapps
items.note: Needs the one 15s screen recording — shot list is in Creative Studio. That clip also works on X.
